productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Sports Analog Brown Watch
description: Stylish and comfortable, this analog wrist watch from fastrack is designed for those who love their everyday wear accessories.Case diameter: 45 mmCase thickness: 10 mmDial shape: Round Steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Leather strap with stitch detailing and a tang clasp for comfort and style Black dial with Arabic numbering of 6, 9 and 12 o& rsquo clock and lines demarcating every hour point, with date socket at 3 o& rsquo clock position, and numbering at every 10 minutes on the periphery of the dial Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time and date Luminescent that helps view time in low light conditions Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistant upto 50 meters, which helps you wear it when swimming
